pluginstrument.author: Snake Stack
pluginstrument.description:
Originally developed by Snake Stack Adapted by Evan Smith for FSX and P3D Updated for FS2020
Updated by David Chambers to include complete graphics with volume control legends, screwhole for installation; Marker Beacon sensitivity lights/function; COM1/2 behaviour when monitoring both; SPKR, PA, PILOT, CREW and COM1/2 buttons (although these do not change/affect the simulator directly); require avionics master power on; self-test lights LEDs briefly on initial power up; confguration option for rounded vs squared off corners. Tested with FSX, X-Plane 11, FS2020.
